## What does this PR do?

- [ ] Adds a new entry
- [ ] Fixes/updates an existing entry
- [ ] Adds a new section
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry links to the official site (not a reseller/affiliate link)
- [ ] "What's Free" column is accurate and specific
- [ ] Real limits/gotchas are noted (non-commercial only, rate limits, signup required, etc.)
- [ ] Placed in the most relevant existing section (or a clear case is made for a new one)
